name: hud_ui_composite_panel_resize_entry_count
description: HudUiCompositePanel::ResizeEntryCount clamps the supplied old active cursor into the requested count, clears and hides entries in the newly inactive tail range, and stores the clamped activeEntryCount.
known_limits: Uses virtual SetTextFmt and SetVisible slots on entries; byte-safe shape should be revisited with the composite-panel class/vtable cluster.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ResizeEntryCount@HudUiCompositePanel@@QAEXHH@Z at 0x4bbed0 still fails: 173 unmasked mismatches, 12 relocation bytes masked, 5 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 196 bytes and the VC object symbol is 144 bytes. The drift follows different vector-count recomputation and virtual-call scheduling.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows thiscall with oldCount and entryCount stack arguments, clamping oldCount to [0, entryCount], bounding entryCount to vector size, clearing tail entries through vtable slot 0x74 with an empty string, hiding them through slot 0x60, and storing activeEntryCount at offset 0x2a4.
The native composite-panel resize smoke validates the oldCount argument drives activeEntryCount, tail text is cleared, tail entries are hidden, and ReapplyEntryCount can clear all current entries.
